name: rbartoli-agent-skills
description: Agent skills for Claude Code — OSINT, podcast extraction, rule capture, conversation harvesting

plugins.name: osint
plugins.description: Structured OSINT investigations using public data. Four-phase workflow: scoping, passive recon, active enumeration, reporting. Progressive disclosure via reference playbooks.

plugins.name: podcast-process
plugins.description: Find the public transcript of a podcast episode (pca.st, Spotify, Apple, Substack, show websites) and extract non-obvious insights, references, and action items. Transcript-first — no audio download, no Whisper, no API keys needed.

plugins.name: rule-capture
plugins.description: Capture durable behavioural rules from user corrections into CLAUDE.md (global, project, or subagent agents.md). Diff-and-approve flow with traceability back to what triggered each rule.

plugins.name: conversation-harvester
plugins.description: Extract insights, decisions, references, and action items from past Claude Code session transcripts. Produces a staging file for human review before downstream routing.
